The gameplay loop for Tawil E2 with “Titan’s Blade” and “Dearest Friend”, with Ryker. 

When you Exalt on Tawil, you can choose cards. These cards can be offensive, defensive, Aliemus gen, and this all depends on the situation. The one card you can never go wrong with on Aequor Tawil is “Lightning Retribution” as it does a boatload of damage and gives you 2 “Pilot”s for each cast, with “Pilots” essentially being 0 cost, free shields. Tawil Exalt makes you “Double Play” the next card you play. Along with “Titan’s Blade” giving you additional Crit Dmg, and “Dearest Friend” Crit Rate, on Awakeners Exalt(Tawil). Hence why you will want to Burst with Tawil “Wings” or Offensive Tawil Cards whenever you Exalt. Any defensive options will be played last, or retained in hand with Prepare for the future.

Ryker has multiple support usages with Tawil. First, his Exalt can allow drawing more cards, which can help greatly if finding “Pinions” or “Wings”. His 1 Cost has two usages. The first is using it outright to get your “Pinions” and play it as soon as possible. The second usage is when you are bursting on Tawil Exalt turn, and can’t draw your “Wings”, then you can use Ryker 1 cost to draw it. Thus continuing your Burst Turn. 

Ryker unique relics, are important, but most importantly his “Dice”. Getting his “Dice” relic makes it so whenever you Exalt, you gain a “Dice” card and rolling a 4 or higher applies 1 Vuln on all enemies. Ryker’s “Coat” relic gives your 10% Crit Rate and you can never role a 1. Ryker’s “Button” is the weakest, and gives Keyflare and Crit Dmg everytime you “Roll A Dice”.

Ryker “Dice” can be upgraded(via Rouse) to apply 1 Vuln and Weak on a 4 or higher roll, and 6 gives 1 Arithma. This is the best upgrade unless you don’t need Weakness, and want to gurantee Vuln more. Then upgraded Ryker “Coat” makes it so every “Dice Roll” is never a 1 and gains a +1. Thus you can never roll lower then 3, as all 2 turn into 3, and 3 into 4.
but also not really, should be fine
